notes: Prebuilt lane from lemonade-sdk release b1224 (gfx110X build).
Required host package libatomic1 on openSUSE before startup.
Initial startup failed on missing libomp.so.
After adding libomp and ROCm libs, process exited with Illegal instruction.
Current evidence indicates the Strix Halo-targeted prebuilt is not runnable on this gfx1100 host.
Container starts but engine core fails during model init.
Observed HIP OOM with attempted 256 GiB allocation in mm-encoder attention path.
